intro:
Blast through hordes of undead—
shoot, dodge, and dash through ever-accelerating stages!
Quick reflexes are the key to victory!
description:
A few months after the chaos of Goonya Monster, Snail finds herself stuck in a peaceful… but boring routine without her beloved battles.
That is, until a massive horde of undead suddenly appears right before her eyes!

This spin-off mini-game from Goonya Monster puts fan-favorite character Snail in the spotlight.
Blast through waves of undead and race across stages that get faster and faster the longer you survive!

◇ Simple controls!
Move left and right to dodge obstacles and defeat incoming undead.
Easy to pick up and play, with gameplay that’s fun for everyone—from kids to adults.

◆ Lose all your life, and it’s game over!
Crashing into enemies or tripping over obstacles will reduce your life.
Once it hits zero, the game is over!

◆ The longer you last, the faster it gets!
As time passes, both Snail’s excitement and the stage speed ramp up.
Stay sharp and react quickly—don’t forget to give your eyes and brain a break!

◆ Choose your weapon and fight your way!
Laser, Gatling Gun, or Crossbow—the choice is yours.
Master each weapon’s unique traits to take down enemies efficiently!
Defeated the undead that drops "Souls". Collect them to level up and power up your weapons!

◆ Clear the way with bombs!
When your bomb gauge is full, unleash a barrage of bombs with your skill button!
Wipe out enemies and obstacles in a flashy explosion and carve your path forward!

◇ Battle mode (Offline 2-player mode)
In this mode, Pirarucu joins the battle from Goonya Monster!
Steal power-ups, tackle your opponent off the stage, and outgrow your rival before the boss fight!
